completedItems: Migrated chat theme switcher to shadcn ButtonGroup with Button variants for selected state.
Migrated chat dev actions and home action to shadcn Button.
Replaced chat loading placeholders with shadcn Skeleton and removed obsolete local skeleton CSS/keyframes.
Replaced empty and conversation-load-error states with shadcn Empty, including a focus-composer action.
Replaced composer textarea with shadcn Textarea and send/clear-reply actions with shadcn Button.
Replaced the custom chat date menu implementation with shadcn DropdownMenu and removed manual outside-click, Escape, focusout, and keyboard option handling.
unfinishedItems: Chat reply references still need HoverCard wrapping.
Further CSS token cleanup remains, including broader replacement of legacy chat-local color variables with shadcn tokens.
Network migration remains untouched in this pass.
npm run lint was not rerun this pass because the prior known blocker is repository-wide Prettier formatting warnings in generated/imported files.

commandResults.output: vite build completed successfully; adapter-auto noted no production environment detected.

issuesDiscovered: DropdownMenu migration substantially increases chat route bundle size because bits-ui dropdown dependencies are now included, expected for shadcn menu primitives.
No commit created because repository still contains pre-existing uncommitted shadcn setup/import changes.

validationAssertionsTouched.notes: Theme state remains intact and root .dark sync from the previous pass is preserved.
Date selection now uses DropdownMenu.Item and still calls jumpToDate(day).
Composer keydown handler remains on the shadcn Textarea.
No-message and load-error chat states now use Empty components.
Loading state now uses Skeleton components.
Conversation date menu now uses DropdownMenu.Root, Trigger, Content, Label, and Item.
npm run check and build pass. Lint remains previously blocked by formatting warnings outside this pass.
